name: sde-interview-script-skill
description: Generate senior SDE interview scripts as Excalidraw-style preview images plus editable links.

interface.longDescription: Turn technical interview excerpts into Chinese-first senior SDE speaking scripts embedded in Chinese-handwritten Excalidraw boards, then reply with only the screenshot and editable link by default.
defaultPrompt: Create a senior SDE Excalidraw screenshot and link only.
Turn this excerpt into a 90-120 second interview answer.
Draw an Excalidraw card with a blue decision flow.
